description: The function checks if the start of the candidate lane is before the end.
The function returns False if the candidate lane overlaps with any existing lane.
The function merges the candidate lane with existing lanes and sorts them.
If the start of the candidate lane is not before the end, a ValueError is raised.
If the candidate lane overlaps with any existing lane, the function returns False.
The function iterates over each existing lane to check for overlaps with the candidate lane.
